evidence: "I believe that these eight seasons are capped off with some of the best mysteries..."
"if you like cop shows and romance.. as well as extremely well developed characters..."
"the relationships and characters are heart warming and the cases very believable and interesting to solve..."
"I love the playful yet historical fiction that comes out of this show.. it is mission impossible without so much shoot em up stuff.."
"the playful romance between the lead characters complete with the challenges of two very different personalities makes me chuckle..."
"I felt such a connection with each character and can see real life interactions happening from pain, jealousy..."
"Great material and great acting.. love the fact that it mirrors much of what is going on in the world today..."
"wish I hadn't waited so long.. what did I expect with Mr. Sorkin doing the writing.. should have known...."
"I hear there are complaints that Sorkin is not reaching us.. but he sure is reaching me.."
"the feel was just warm and wonderful.. a good watch"
"I found this humorous.. and a good way to understand my mother a lot of the times..."
"makes me chuckle, recognize, and feel so good about humanity and love."
"I felt such a connection with each character and can see real life interactions happening..."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery and romance genres, enjoying character-driven narratives with emotional depth. They appreciate high production quality and have a notable loyalty to Aaron Sorkin's work, indicating a taste for well-crafted storytelling that resonates on a personal level.
